message:
perf(search): add summary-field JSON fast-path bypassing serde_json::Value intermediary

When all preconditions are met (JSON format, summary projection, no
truncation, no metadata/warnings/aggregations/suggestions), serialize
the response directly via a custom Serialize impl on SummaryHitCompat
instead of materializing intermediate serde_json::Value maps and string
clones per hit. This avoids per-hit heap allocations for the common
robot-mode summary query path.

The fast path uses BufWriter on stdout with serde_json::to_writer_pretty
for zero-copy streaming output, matching the existing output format
contract while eliminating the Value round-trip overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
